name: tech-detector
description: Identify website technologies via Wappalyzer (Puppeteer) from a Parquet domain list

scripts.postinstall: node node_modules/puppeteer/install.mjs && node scripts/patch-wappalyzer-scroll.js && node scripts/patch-wappalyzer-viewport.js && node scripts/patch-wappalyzer-safety.js && node scripts/patch-wappalyzer-stealth.js
